summary:
Recovery: Average

Reading: State
Average
Recovery 61 • Sleep 53 • Strain 59%

Read
Recovery is serviceable, but short sleep leaves less margin while morning output has already drawn a moderate reserve. With first fueling still absent, the afternoon favors a measured meal anchored in protein over chasing a larger deficit, preserving muscle while keeping fat loss gradual.

Steady over sharp.

Performance: Steady over sharp.

Transit: none
